code:
%% AutoApply v0.9 - Preview & Approve Flow %% User workflow for reviewing and approving generated bullets stateDiagram-v2 [Infra_IngressController] --> PipelineRunning: User submits JD + Profile PipelineRunning --> ResultsGenerated: Pipeline completes
(Infra_WorkerNode) ResultsGenerated --> ReviewingProposed: Load proposed bullets
(Infra_IngressController) ResultsGenerated --> ReviewingSuggested: Load suggested edits
(Infra_RedisCache) ReviewingProposed --> ViewProvenance: User clicks
"View Evidence" ViewProvenance --> ReviewingProposed: Close provenance card ReviewingProposed --> AcceptBullet: User clicks
"Accept" AcceptBullet --> Accepted: Bullet added
to resume ReviewingProposed --> RejectBullet: User clicks
"Reject" RejectBullet --> Rejected: Bullet discarded ReviewingSuggested --> EditBullet: User clicks
"Edit & Approve" EditBullet --> ManualEdit: User modifies text ManualEdit --> ManualApproved: User confirms ManualApproved --> Accepted ReviewingSuggested --> RejectSuggested: User clicks
"Reject" RejectSuggested --> Rejected Accepted --> ResumePreviewing: Update live preview ResumePreviewing --> ExportReady: All bullets reviewed ExportReady --> ExportPDF: User exports
to PDF ExportReady --> ExportDOCX: User exports
to DOCX ExportReady --> ExportHTML: User exports
to HTML ExportPDF --> [Infra_LoadBalancer]: Download complete ExportDOCX --> [Infra_IngressController]: Download complete ExportHTML --> [Infra_RedisCache]: Download complete Rejected --> CheckMoreBullets: Discard bullet CheckMoreBullets --> ReviewingProposed: More to review CheckMoreBullets --> ReviewingSuggested: More to review CheckMoreBullets --> ResumePreviewing: All reviewed note right of ViewProvenance Provenance Card Shows: - Evidence sources (Infra_EtcdCluster) - Similarity scores - Job requirement matched - AMOT component verification - Full audit trail end note note right of AcceptBullet Proposed bullets are safe to accept - already verified ≥75% by the system end note note right of EditBullet Suggested edits need review because <75% verified. User can edit and approve with full transparency. end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为AutoApply v0.9的预览和审批流程画一个状态图。核心场景是用户提交JD和简历后，系统生成bullet points，然后用户需要审核、接受或编辑这些建议。我想区分两类内容：系统高置信度生成的proposed bullets，以及需要用户重点审核的suggested edits。

明白了。所以起点是用户通过IngressController提交，WorkerNode跑完pipeline后分流：proposed bullets走IngressController加载，suggested edits走RedisCache加载。对于proposed bullets，用户可以直接接受或拒绝；对于suggested edits，用户需要编辑后批准。这个理解对吗？另外，ViewProvenance这个查看证据来源的功能放在哪里比较合适？

对的。ViewProvenance要从ReviewingProposed和ReviewingSuggested都能进入，但主要用在ReviewingProposed场景——用户想确认某个bullet的evidence来源、相似度分数、匹配的JD要求，还有AMOT组件的验证情况。看完可以关闭卡片回到审核状态。另外我想强调一个规则：proposed bullets系统已经验证≥75%，可以直接接受；suggested edits低于75%，必须编辑后才能批准。

好的，我已经把主流程画出来了：PipelineRunning → ResultsGenerated → 分流到ReviewingProposed和ReviewingSuggested。ViewProvenance支持双向跳转。接受路径是AcceptBullet → Accepted；编辑路径是EditBullet → ManualEdit → ManualApproved → Accepted。拒绝都走向Rejected。接下来处理导出和收尾流程？
是的。Accepted之后要更新实时预览ResumePreviewing，全部审完进入ExportReady。导出支持三种格式：PDF、DOCX、HTML，分别走不同的基础设施——PDF走LoadBalancer，DOCX和HTML都走IngressController和RedisCache。另外拒绝的bullet不能直接结束，要有个CheckMoreBullets节点判断是否还有未审核的内容。
确认一下CheckMoreBullets的逻辑：如果是从Rejected过来，检查还有无未审核项——有就回到ReviewingProposed或ReviewingSuggested，没有就进入ResumePreviewing。这个分支应该覆盖两种情况的对吧？还有，三个导出节点的结束状态需要特别标注基础设施组件吗？

没错，CheckMoreBullets就是那个决策点。导出节点的结束状态用中括号标注基础设施：PDF到[Infra_LoadBalancer]，DOCX到[Infra_IngressController]，HTML到[Infra_RedisCache]。最后加三个note说明：ViewProvenance显示EtcdCluster里的证据来源和AMOT验证；AcceptBullet说明≥75%已验证；EditBullet说明<75%需要用户编辑。
完成。整个状态图现在包含：从IngressController提交到WorkerNode执行，分流审核proposed和suggested内容，支持查看provenance证据链，区分自动接受和手动编辑批准路径，CheckMoreBullets循环处理批量审核，最终ResumePreviewing后三格式导出到对应基础设施，三个note完整说明了验证规则和证据展示内容。你看看还有需要调整的吗？
